name: qa-scribe
description: Local-first desktop testing notepad for turning testing sessions into structured testware.
author: qa-scribe contributors

scripts.rust:audit: cargo audit --deny warnings --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0370 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0411 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0412 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0413 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0414 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0415 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0416 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0417 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0418 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0419 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0420 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0429 --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0436 --ignore RUSTSEC-2025-0075 --ignore RUSTSEC-2025-0080 --ignore RUSTSEC-2025-0081 --ignore RUSTSEC-2025-0098 --ignore RUSTSEC-2025-0100 --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0190 --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0194 --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0195
scripts.bindings:generate: cd src-tauri && UPDATE_BINDINGS=1 cargo test --bin qa-scribe-tauri bindings_are_up_to_date
scripts.bindings:check: cd src-tauri && cargo test --bin qa-scribe-tauri bindings_are_up_to_date
scripts.typecheck: bun run frontend:typecheck && node scripts/ensure-frontend-dist.mjs && cargo check --workspace
scripts.lint: bun run frontend:lint && node scripts/ensure-frontend-dist.mjs && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: bun run frontend:test && node scripts/ensure-frontend-dist.mjs && cargo test --workspace
scripts.dist:mac: cd src-tauri && cargo tauri build --bundles dmg
scripts.dist:mac:app: cd src-tauri && cargo tauri build --bundles app
scripts.linux:package-manager:check: node scripts/package-tauri-linux.mjs && bun run linux:metadata:check -- --skip-external-tools && bun run apt:repo:check && bun run apt:installer:check
scripts.release:check: node scripts/check-release-metadata.mjs && bun run linux:metadata:test && bun run release:script-tests
scripts.verify: bun run frontend:audit && bun run rust:audit && bun run frontend:check && bun run frontend:test && bun run release:check && bun run frontend:build && bash scripts/check-tauri-prebuilt-frontend.sh && bun run bindings:check && bun run tauri:commands:check && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace && cargo build --workspace && cargo run -p qa-scribe-app
scripts.verify:fast: bun run frontend:check && bun run frontend:test && node scripts/ensure-frontend-dist.mjs && bun run tauri:commands:check && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
